creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 180851
fix

In base r315051 BSD diff was imported and it seems to lack the --ignore-blank-lines switch.

I have modified portshaker port to adapt on such systems. I used the nearest __FreeBSD_version value I could find.

I'm CCing bapt, who imported BSD diff just to keep him informed, in case this discovery is of any interest to him. Thanks for your work!
